glosses.ja: 薬を飲む; お金を受け取る

sentences.target: Ich muss die Tabletten jetzt einnehmen.

translations.de: Ich muss die Tabletten jetzt einnehmen.
translations.en: I have to take the tablets now.
translations.es: Tengo que tomar las pastillas ahora.
translations.fr: Je dois prendre les comprimés maintenant.
translations.pt: Tenho que tomar os comprimidos agora.
translations.he: אני צריך לקחת את הכדורים עכשיו.
translations.vi: Tôi phải uống thuốc ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: Ik moet nu de tabletten innemen.
translations.hu: Most be kell vennem a tablettákat.
translations.el: Πρέπει τώρα να πάρω τα χάπια.
translations.ja: 今すぐ錠剤を飲まなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun; nominative subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in the present; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'einnehmen'.
Definite article; accusative plural determiner for 'Tabletten'.
Plural common noun; direct object of 'einnehmen' (what is to be taken).
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the action.
Infinitive of a separable verb; lexical verb selected by 'muss'; here means consuming prescribed tablets.

sentences.target: Der Kiosk muss heute viel einnehmen.

translations.de: Der Kiosk muss heute viel einnehmen.
translations.en: The kiosk has to make a lot of money today.
translations.es: El quiosco tiene que ganar mucho dinero hoy.
translations.fr: Le kiosque doit gagner beaucoup d'argent aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Il chiosco deve incassare molto oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 키오스크가 돈을 많이 벌어야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天这个报亭得多赚点钱。
translations.yue: 呢個報亭今日要賺好多錢。
translations.pt: O quiosque precisa faturar bastante hoje.
translations.he: הקיוסק צריך להכניס הרבה כסף היום.
translations.tr: Bugün büfenin çok para kazanması gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Quầy báo hôm nay phải kiếm được nhiều tiền.
translations.ar: يجب أن يربح الكشك الكثير من المال היום.
translations.nl: De kiosk moet vandaag veel geld verdienen.
translations.hu: A kiosknak ma sok pénzt kell keresnie.
translations.hi: आज स्टॉल को बहुत पैसा कमाना है.
translations.el: Το περίπτερο πρέπει σήμερα να βγάλει πολλά χρήματα.
translations.nb: Kiosken må tjene mye penger i dag.
translations.id: Kios hari ini harus menghasilkan banyak uang.
translations.sv: Kiosken måste tjäna mycket pengar i dag.
translations.ro: Chioșcul trebuie să câștige mulți bani astăzi.
translations.cs: Kiosek dnes musí vydělat hodně peněz.
translations.da: Kiosken skal tjene mange penge i dag.
translations.fi: Kioskin pitää tänään tienata paljon rahaa.
translations.ja: その売店は今日たくさん稼がないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular determiner for the subject 'Kiosk'.
Singular common noun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; expresses necessity and selects the infinitive 'einnehmen'.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame for the action.
Degree/quantifier adverb; modifies 'einnehmen' to indicate a large amount.
Infinitive of a separable verb; lexical verb meaning to take in/earn money (revenue).

sentences.target: Die Leute sollen ihre Plätze einnehmen.

translations.de: Die Leute sollen ihre Plätze einnehmen.
translations.en: People are supposed to take their seats.
translations.pt: As pessoas devem ocupar seus lugares.
translations.vi: Mọi người nên vào chỗ ngồi của mình.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن يجلس الناس في مقاعدهم.
translations.hu: Az embereknek el kell foglalniuk a helyüket.
translations.hi: लोगों को अपनी जगह पर बैठना चाहिए.
translations.el: Ο κόσμος πρέπει να καθίσει στις θέσεις του.
translations.id: Orang-orang seharusnya mengambil tempat duduk mereka.
translations.ro: Oamenii trebuie să își ocupe locurile.
translations.cs: Lidé by měli zaujmout svá místa.
translations.ja: みんなは席に着くことになっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; plural determiner for 'Leute'.
Plural common noun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; expresses obligation/expectation; selects the infinitive 'einnehmen'.
Possessive determiner; agrees with plural 'Plätze' and refers to the subject's seats.
Plural common noun; direct object of 'einnehmen' (what is to be occupied).
Infinitive of a separable verb; lexical verb meaning to take/occupy seats.

sentences.target: Er will keine Medikamente mehr einnehmen.

translations.de: Er will keine Medikamente mehr einnehmen.
translations.en: He doesn't want to take any more medication.
translations.fr: Il ne veut plus prendre de médicaments.
translations.ko: 그는 더 이상 약을 먹고 싶지 않다.
translations.ru: Он больше не хочет принимать лекарства.
translations.pt: Ele não quer tomar mais remédios.
translations.he: הוא לא רוצה לקחת יותר תרופות.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không muốn uống thuốc nữa.
translations.ar: هو لا يريد تناول الأدوية بعد الآن.
translations.nl: Hij wil geen medicijnen meer nemen.
translations.uk: Він більше не хоче приймати ліки.
translations.hi: वह अब दवा नहीं लेना चाहता.
translations.pl: On nie chce już brać leków.
translations.el: Δεν θέλει πια να παίρνει φάρμακα.
translations.nb: Han vil ikke ta mer medisin.
translations.id: Dia tidak mau minum obat lagi.
translations.sv: Han vill inte ta mer medicin.
translations.ro: El nu mai vrea să ia medicamente.
translations.da: Han vil ikke tage mere medicin.
translations.fi: Hän ei halua ottaa enää lääkkeitä.
translations.ja: 彼はもう薬を飲みたくない。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular personal pronoun; nominative subject.
Modal auxiliary; expresses volition and selects the infinitive 'einnehmen'.
Negative determiner; plural form modifying 'Medikamente', contributing sentential negation.
Plural common noun; direct object of 'einnehmen' (what is not to be taken).
Temporal/degree adverb meaning ‘anymore/no longer’ in a negative context; modifies the predicate.
Infinitive of a separable verb; lexical verb selected by 'will'; here denotes ingesting medication.

Die Leute sollen ihre Plätze einnehmen.
Er will keine Medikamente mehr einnehmen.

Er will keine Medikamente mehr einnehmen.

People are supposed to take their seats.
He doesn't want to take any more medication.
